name: Sliced Chicken with Broccoli
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the stems from broccoli.
2. Cut chicken breast crosswise on an angle into 1/4-inch-thick slices.
3. In a small bowl, toss chicken with cornstarch, soy sauce, and lemon extract.
4. Heat oil in a wok or frying pan over medium heat for 10 seconds.
5. Add broccoli and stir-fry until coated with oil. Stir in 2 tablespoons water, reduce heat to low, cover, and cook until broccoli is just tender, about 2 minutes. Remove broccoli to a plate with a slotted spoon.
6. Return wok to high heat. Add ginger and scallion and stir-fry until aromatic for about 10 seconds.
7. Add chicken and stir-fry until white and opaque throughout, about 5 minutes.
8. Stir in sherry, pepper, sugar, and broccoli. Cook for about 30 seconds to heat through.
9. Remove from heat, drizzle with sesame oil, and serve.
